Story.Summary: Validate address normalization during quote intake
Story.Description: As a quoting user, I want addresses normalized before quote submission so that downstream policy systems receive consistent address data.

AcceptanceCriteria.AcceptanceCriterion: Given a valid street address with lowercase text, when quote intake validates the address, then the normalized address uses uppercase street and city values.
Given an address missing postalCode, when quote intake validates the address, then validation returns ADDRESS_POSTAL_CODE_REQUIRED and the quote is not submitted.
Given the address normalization service is unavailable, when quote intake validates the address, then the user sees ADDRESS_VALIDATION_TEMPORARILY_UNAVAILABLE and the quote is not submitted.

BusinessRules.Rule: Do not submit a quote until address validation succeeds.
Normalized address values must be stored without changing policyholder identity data.

Story.PrivacyNotes: Synthetic internal test data only. No PII or PHI.
